center.name: 瓜希拉半岛
center.summary: 瓜希拉半岛是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Golden-winged sparrow，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: fratruelis can be found in Serranía de Macuira, located on the Guajira Peninsula of northern Columbia
